# Tests

- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] Manual route check
- [ ] Keyboard/focus check when UI changed
- [ ] Public safety review

# Content Checklist

- [ ] Claims are verified.
- [ ] Sources and dates are documented.
- [ ] No private information was copied.
- [ ] No data from `.local-context/` was published without human approval.
- [ ] The diff was reviewed before requesting merge.
